stimulus_shape.target: CON (Relate x Structure) at L3 significance — the structural reveal

source: orthogonal collision of two random Wikipedia draws
difficulty: intermediate — half-passed under the live engine: the mass channel (bayes) missed the reveal entirely, and the existing raw-id bridge diagnostic FAILED on this material (a coref blind spot the hand-built stimulus never hit)
novelty: high — the short-name cross-domain reveal class (a standing entity named by a new surface form) was not in the archive
verdict: confirmed capability + interior fix shipped; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: EVA (the one-surprise core) — the NOVELTY reserve, the protention amplitude for the as-yet-unseen unit

source: inside-out seed — the constant hunt made literal: a draw on a fixed number in the predictive path (NOVELTY_RESERVE in src/core/surprise.js), the exemplar the campaign names
difficulty: intermediate — half-passed under the live engine: surprise correctly FIRES on a newcomer (surface novelty) but is BLIND to the recent novelty RATE — a newcomer after ten confirmations and a newcomer after ten newcomers both scored the identical bayesBits=0.28. Edge-of-competence: one principled, constant-free fix moves it from 0.00 to 1.48 bits of separation.
novelty: high — the protention/reserve class (a reserve tracking the recent newcomer rate) was absent from the archive; exp-0001 was connectivity-over-structure, this is the amplitude for the unseen
verdict: confirmed capability + interior fix shipped behind RULES_REV; regression-locked; omnimodal (text organ ≡ tone operator-log, byte-identical)
